name: Watercress Salad with Bean Cheese Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash watercress (or spinach) in a colander.
2. Pour boiling water over the watercress. Immediately plunge the vegetable into cold water to stop the cooking process; drain and reserve.
3. To make the dressing, cream together sesame paste, unseasoned bean cheese, and salad oil.
4. Add chili flakes, sugar, lemon juice, and cold water to the mixture; mix well.
5. Shortly before serving, toss the dressing with watercress.
6. Serve on individual salad plates.
